title: Spicy Dense Italian Duck Legs Confit
description: A spicy and dense Italian dish featuring duck legs, perfect for midnight cravings. This recipe uses render-fat for a rich flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the duck legs with salt, black pepper, and thyme.
Heat the rendered duck fat in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Sear the duck legs until browned on all sides, then remove from heat.
Add garlic, red pepper flakes, and lemon juice to the Dutch oven.
Return the duck legs to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and cook for 2 hours.
Remove the pot from the oven and let the duck legs cool in the fat.
Strain the fat and serve the duck legs with the spicy garlic sauce.
